title: Cookie Expansion
description: A mod that adds more types of cookies
body:
# Features
- This mod adds different cookies that fit into the vanilla style and try to provide a practical use to the player
### Plain Cookie
- Gives the same hunger as a vanilla cookie but no saturation
- Cheaper and can be crafted in the 2x2 grid due to only needing 2 wheat
### Chocolate Cookie
- Same as the vanilla cookie, just renamed
- Now grants 10 seconds of strength when eaten
### Sugar Cookie
- Gives the same hunger and saturation as a vanilla cookie
- Grants 20 seconds of speed 2 when eaten
- Requires 2 Wheat and 1 Sugar to craft
### Honey Cookie
- Gives the same hunger and saturation as a vanilla cookie
- Grants 10 seconds of regeneration 3 when eaten
- Requires 2 Wheat and 1 Honey Bottle to craft
### Sweetberry Cookie
- Gives the same hunger and saturation as a vanilla cookie
- Grants Instant Health when eaten
- Requires 2 Wheat and 1 Sweetberry to craft
### Glowberry Cookie
- Gives the same hunger and saturation as a vanilla cookie
- Grants 30 seconds of Glowing when eaten
- Requires 2 Wheat and 1 Glowberry to craft
